Properties

AlignSelf 

public FlexAlign AlignSelf { get; init; }

Property Value

FlexAlign

Basis 

public float Basis { get; init; }

Property Value

float

Bold

Bold sugar — kept for the many existing call sites; equivalent to Weight = 700. Ignored when Weight is set explicitly.

public bool Bold { get; init; }

Property Value

bool

BrushTransitionMs

Implicit brush transition for the resting Color: a re-render that changes it on this LIVE node cross-fades over this duration (WinUI BrushTransition, 83ms in templates). NaN = snap.

public float BrushTransitionMs { get; init; }

Property Value

float

CharSpacing

WinUI TextElement.CharacterSpacing: tracking in 1/1000 em (negative = tighter), applied as a per-glyph trailing advance adjustment after shaping (e.g. Pivot headers use −25).

public float CharSpacing { get; init; }

Property Value

float

Color

Defaults to the live theme's TextFillColorPrimary (WinUI TextBlock default foreground — dark #FFFFFF / light #E4000000), resolved at element CONSTRUCTION. NOTE: a runtime Tok.Use switch does not itself re-render — the theme is set at startup today; a live theme switcher must force a full re-render or every construction-resolved color (this default, control Style records) goes stale.

public Prop<ColorF> Color { get; init; }

Property Value

Prop<ColorF>

public ColorF DisabledColor { get; init; }

Property Value

ColorF

public DynamicTextKind DynamicText { get; init; }

DynamicTextKind

ElementTypeId

Stable per-record-type id for integer type-dispatch in the reconciler (the source-gen'd ElementTypeId).

public override ushort ElementTypeId { get; }

ushort

Height 

public float Height { get; init; }

float

HoverColor 

public ColorF HoverColor { get; init; }

Property Value

ColorF

IsTextSelectionEnabled

Read-only text selection (rtb-02): mouse drag selects, double-click selects the word, triple-click all, Ctrl+C copies via the clipboard seam; the highlight reuses the editor's selection-rect path. Default FALSE — WinUI TextBlock selection is opt-in (TextBlock.cpp:583 IsTextSelectionEnabled property change creates the selection manager on demand); RichTextBlock turns it on by default (RichTextBlock.cpp:1730). A selectable run is focusable (Ctrl+C routes to it) and shows the I-beam cursor.

public bool IsTextSelectionEnabled { get; init; }

Property Value

bool

LineBounds

WinUI TextBlock.TextLineBounds (default Full — TextBlock_themeresources.xaml:17): Tight trims the measured line box to cap-height..baseline so vertical centering is optical (PersonPicture initials).

public TextLineBounds LineBounds { get; init; }

Property Value

TextLineBounds

LineHeight

WinUI TextBlock.LineHeight in DIP (NaN = font-natural); interpreted per LineStacking.

public float LineHeight { get; init; }

Property Value

float

LineStacking

WinUI TextBlock.LineStackingStrategy (default MaxHeight — TextBlock_themeresources.xaml:16): how an explicit LineHeight combines with the font-natural line box.

public LineStacking LineStacking { get; init; }

Property Value

LineStacking

public Edges4 Margin { get; init; }

Property Value

Edges4

MaxHeight 

public float MaxHeight { get; init; }

Property Value

float

MaxLines

Cap the visible line count (0 = unlimited); the last line trims per Trim.

public int MaxLines { get; init; }

int

PressedColor

ColorF

ResolvedWeight

The weight the text pipeline shapes with: Weight when set, else Bold→700 / 400.

public ushort ResolvedWeight { get; }

Property Value

ushort

SelectionHighlightColor

Per-control selection highlight (api-04, WinUI TextBlock.SelectionHighlightColor — TextBlock.cpp:266/330). A==0 (default) = the engine/theme brush (the system accent, TextSelectionManager.cpp:52-56 GetDefaultSelectionHighlightColor → GetSystemAccentColor ≡ the host's TextEditStyle.SelectionFill).

public ColorF SelectionHighlightColor { get; init; }

Property Value

ColorF

Shrink 

public float Shrink { get; init; }

Property Value

float

Size 

public float Size { get; init; }

Property Value

float

Strikethrough

WinUI TextDecorations.Strikethrough: the face-metric strikethrough bar (reuses the underline thickness, the DWrite convention) — e.g. CalendarView blackout dates.

public bool Strikethrough { get; init; }

Property Value

bool

Text 

public Prop<string> Text { get; init; }

Property Value

Prop<string>

Trim

Overflow trimming (WinUI TextTrimming): None / Clip / CharacterEllipsis / WordEllipsis.

public TextTrim Trim { get; init; }

Property Value

TextTrim

Underline

WinUI TextDecorations.Underline: the recorder draws the face-metric underline bar (DWrite underlinePosition/underlineThickness, cached at measure on the scene's TextMeasureCache) under the run, in the SAME resolved foreground as the glyphs (hover/press ramps + BrushTransition). Single-line frame — per-line decoration of wrapped runs is the rich-text (SpanTextEl/RichTextBlock) pass. HyperlinkButton drives this from its HyperlinkUnderlineVisible/HighContrast gate (HyperLinkButton_Partial.cpp:207-212).

public bool Underline { get; init; }

Property Value

bool

Weight

Numeric font weight (WinUI FontWeight, 1–999 — the value IS the DWrite weight; the WinUI type ramp is SemiBold 600, BaseTextBlockStyle FontWeight, TextBlock_themeresources.xaml:13). 0 = unset → resolves from Bold (700) or Normal (400); see ResolvedWeight.

public ushort Weight { get; init; }

Property Value

ushort

Width 

public float Width { get; init; }

Property Value

float

Wrap

Line-break behavior (WinUI TextWrapping): NoWrap / Wrap / WrapWholeWords.

public TextWrap Wrap { get; init; }

Property Value

TextWrap
FluentGpu — a near-zero-allocation, NativeAOT, GPU-rendered UI engine for .NET 10. Usage docs live here; architecture canon lives in design/ (SPEC-INDEX.md is the precedence authority).
